subject: Re: Fwd: Meeting with Rwandan students?

march 14

> From: "Tascha Alvarez von Gustedt"

> To: <DKIESQ@aol.com>
> 
> Dear Darren,
>  
> Please forgive my persistance, but I wanted to
> follow up on setting up a
> meeting between Mr. Epstein and both Rwandan
> students he is sponsoring.
> I do not mean to be pushy, therefore, if Mr. Epstein

> coming weeks, please let me know and we can postpone
> it until we find a
> time that is convenient for all - but evidently
> particularly him. It may

> I'm sure the students can be more flexible, and they
> are so excited to
> meet him, that they should be able to work their
> schedules around his

body_html:
march 14

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

What shall I tell them this time?

Darren

Subject: Meeting with Rwandan students?
Date: Mon, 6 Mar 2006 17:09:58 -0500
From: "Tascha Alvarez von Gustedt"
talvarez@clintonfoundation.org
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Dear Darren,

Please forgive my persistance, but I wanted to
follow up on setting up a
meeting between Mr. Epstein and both Rwandan
students he is sponsoring.
I do not mean to be pushy, therefore, if Mr. Epstein
is busy in the
coming weeks, please let me know and we can postpone
it until we find a
time that is convenient for all - but evidently
particularly him. It may
be easiest if you propose when is a good day and
time for Mr. Epstein,
I'm sure the students can be more flexible, and they
are so excited to
meet him, that they should be able to work their
schedules around his
availability (unless they have exams, I guess).

Thank you for your patience with me and for your
help coordinating this.

Best,

Tascha

Tascha Alvarez von Gustedt
Assistant Director, Foreign Policy
Office of President William J. Clinton
Tel. 212-348-8882
Fax. 212-348-9245
www.clintonfoundation.org
http://www.clintonfoundation.org/
